name: Vegetarian Spring Roll - Tofu Filling
steps: Press Tofu (Clean Bean) for two hours you should have a loss of 20% of the Weight.
Chop and Fry the Mustard greens for a bit, just to lose some of the water content, you should have a 30% loss of the weight at the end.
Wash the Spinach, dry it and wilt it in a pan so that it's cooked and the water of spinach has sort of evaporated.
Squeeze all the water out of the spinach with a J-cloth.
Chop the pressed tofu, Chop the Spinach, mix them together and add the seasonings.
Add the chopped preserved mustard to the mix. Taste it and add salt if needed.
